# RESEARCH: Anthropic

### COMPANY OVERVIEW, FOUNDING YEAR, HEADQUARTERS, MISSION, AND KEY PRODUCTS OR SERVICES
Anthropic is an American artificial intelligence (AI) safety and research company headquartered in San Francisco, California. Founded in 2021 by former OpenAI researchers—including siblings Dario Amodei (CEO) and Daniela Amodei (President)—Anthropic focuses on developing reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. ([anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic.com/company?utm_source=openai))

**Mission:**
Anthropic is dedicated to building AI systems that people can rely on, emphasizing safety, interpretability, and steerability. The company conducts frontier research, applies various safety techniques, and deploys resulting systems through partnerships and products. ([anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic.com/company?utm_source=openai))

**Key Products and Services:**
Anthropic's flagship product is the Claude family of large language models (LLMs), designed with a focus on safety and interpretability. These models include:

- **Claude 4 Opus:** An advanced LLM known for its nuanced reasoning and instruction-following capabilities.
- **Claude 4 Sonnet:** Another iteration in the Claude series, emphasizing safety and reliability.
- **Claude API:** A developer platform for building applications using Claude models.

In addition to these, Anthropic offers tools like Claude Code, a command-line interface (CLI) agentic coding tool that operates on full codebases, runs commands, and autonomously iterates on errors. ([aipedia.wiki](https://aipedia.wiki/companies/anthropic/?utm_source=openai))

As of May 2026, Anthropic employs approximately 2,500 people and has achieved a valuation of $380 billion. ([forbes.com](https://www.forbes.com/companies/anthropic/?utm_source=openai))

### FUNDING HISTORY, TOTAL RAISED, INVESTORS, VALUATION, AND LATEST FUNDING ROUND
Anthropic, the AI startup behind the Claude chatbot, has experienced significant growth since its inception in 2021. Here's a detailed overview of its funding history, total capital raised, key investors, valuation, and the latest funding round:

**Funding History and Total Capital Raised:**

Since its founding, Anthropic has participated in multiple funding rounds, accumulating a total of approximately $93.1 billion in capital. The most recent funding round occurred in May 2026, where the company raised an additional $1.5 billion. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

**Key Investors:**

Anthropic's investors include a diverse group of prominent firms and individuals:

- **GIC**: Singapore's sovereign wealth fund co-led the Series G funding round in February 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai))

- **Coatue Management**: Co-led the Series G funding round in February 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai))

- **D.E. Shaw Ventures**: Participated in the Series G funding round in February 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai))

- **Dragoneer Investment Group**: Participated in the Series G funding round in February 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai))

- **Founders Fund**: Participated in the Series G funding round in February 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai))

- **ICONIQ**: Participated in the Series G funding round in February 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai))

- **MGX**: Participated in the Series G funding round in February 2026. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai))

- **Microsoft**: Invested in the November 2025 funding round. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

- **Nvidia**: Invested in the November 2025 funding round. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

- **Blackstone Inc**: Invested in the May 2026 funding round. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

- **Hellman & Friedman**: Invested in the May 2026 funding round. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

- **Goldman Sachs**: Invested in the May 2026 funding round. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

- **General Atlantic**: Invested in the May 2026 funding round. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

- **Leonard Green**: Invested in the May 2026 funding round. ([owler.com](https://www.owler.com/company/anthropic2/funding?utm_source=openai))

**Valuation:**

As of February 2026, following the Series G funding round, Anthropic's valuation reached $380 billion. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-12/anthropic-finalizes-30-billion-funding-at-380-billion-value?utm_source=openai)) In April 2026, the company achieved a valuation of $1 trillion in the private secondary market, surpassing its previous valuation and that of its competitor, OpenAI. ([tomshardware.com](https://www.tomshardware.com/tech-industry/artificial-intelligence/anthropic-surpasses-biggest-rival-openai-in-secondary-market-valuation-surges-to-usd1-trillion-amid-frantic-investor-interest?utm_source=openai))

**Latest Funding Round:**

In February 2026, Anthropic completed a $30 billion Series G funding round, more than doubling its valuation to $380 billion. The round was co-led by GIC and Coatue Management, with participation from D.E. Shaw Ventures, Dragoneer Investment Group, Founders Fund, ICONIQ, and MGX. Other significant investors included Accel, Addition, Alpha Wave Global, Altimeter, AMP PBC, Appaloosa LP, Baillie Gifford, Bessemer Venture Partners, BlackRock, Blackstone, D1 Capital Partners, Fidelity Management & Research Company, General Catalyst, Greenoaks, Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives, Insight Partners, Jane Street, JPMorganChase, Lightspeed Venture Partners, Menlo Ventures, Morgan Stanley Investment Management, NX1 Capital, Qatar Investment Authority, Sands Capital, Sequoia Capital, Temasek, TowerBrook, TPG, Whale Rock Capital, and XN. ([anthropic.com](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-raises-30-billion-series-g-funding-380-billion-post-money-valuation?e45d281a_page=4&utm_source=openai))

This substantial funding underscores the growing investor confidence in Anthropic's AI technologies and its position in the competitive AI landscape.


## Highlights:
- [Anthropic surpasses biggest rival OpenAI in secondary market valuation - surges to $1 trillion amid frantic investor interest](https://www.tomshardware.com/tech-industry/artificial-intelligence/anthropic-surpasses-biggest-rival-openai-in-secondary-market-valuation-surges-to-usd1-trillion-amid-frantic-investor-interest?utm_source=openai), Published on Thursday, April 23
- [Anthropic raises $30B at $380B valuation](https://www.axios.com/2026/02/12/anthropic-raises-30b-at-380b-valuation?utm_source=openai), Published on Thursday, February 12
- [Anthropic says $30bn funding round will help 'fuel' frontier AI research and infrastructure expansion](https://www.itpro.com/business/anthropic-series-g-investment-round-claude?utm_source=openai), Published on Friday, February 13

### FOUNDING TEAM, CEO BACKGROUND, KEY EXECUTIVES, AND LEADERSHIP
Anthropic, established in 2021, is a San Francisco-based artificial intelligence company specializing in AI safety and research. The company was founded by former OpenAI executives and siblings Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, along with several other key figures from OpenAI.

**Founding Team and Leadership:**

- **Dario Amodei**: Serving as CEO and Co-Founder, Dario was previously the Vice President of Research at OpenAI. His work has been central to advancing techniques that use human feedback to train AI systems. ([observer.com](https://observer.com/2025/11/11-executives-driving-anthropics-meteoric-rise-in-the-a-i-boom/?utm_source=openai))

- **Daniela Amodei**: As President and Co-Founder, Daniela was formerly the Vice President of Safety and Policy at OpenAI, focusing on risk mitigation and operational oversight. ([observer.com](https://observer.com/2025/11/11-executives-driving-anthropics-meteoric-rise-in-the-a-i-boom/?utm_source=openai))

- **Jack Clark**: Co-Founder and Head of Policy, Jack previously served as OpenAI's Policy Director, ensuring that AI development aligns with societal needs and regulatory frameworks. ([sparkco.ai](https://sparkco.ai/blog/anthropic?utm_source=openai))

- **Tom Brown**: Co-Founder and Lead Researcher, Tom was the lead author of the GPT-3 paper at OpenAI, contributing significantly to the development of large language models. ([sparkco.ai](https://sparkco.ai/blog/anthropic?utm_source=openai))

- **Chris Olah**: Co-Founder and Interpretability Research Lead, Chris is renowned for his work in AI interpretability and alignment, key areas for Anthropic's strategic direction. ([sparkco.ai](https://sparkco.ai/blog/anthropic?utm_source=openai))

- **Jared Kaplan**: Co-Founder and Chief Science Officer, Jared is a theoretical physicist and OpenAI alum, contributing to Anthropic's scientific research initiatives. ([research.contrary.com](https://research.contrary.com/reports/anthropic?utm_source=openai))

- **Sam McCandlish**: Co-Founder and Chief Architect, Sam was a former OpenAI research scientist, focusing on the architectural aspects of AI systems. ([research.contrary.com](https://research.contrary.com/reports/anthropic?utm_source=openai))

- **Benjamin Mann**: Co-Founder and Head of Anthropic Labs, Benjamin played a pivotal role in establishing the company's research division. ([research.contrary.com](https://research.contrary.com/reports/anthropic?utm_source=openai))

**Key Executives:**

- **Mike Krieger**: Chief Product Officer, Mike joined Anthropic in May 2024, bringing experience from his previous role as co-founder of Instagram. ([observer.com](https://observer.com/2025/11/11-executives-driving-anthropics-meteoric-rise-in-the-a-i-boom/?utm_source=openai))

- **Krishna Rao**: Chief Financial Officer, Krishna oversees the company's financial operations, ensuring strategic growth and stability. ([theorg.com](https://theorg.com/org/anthropic/teams/leadership-team-1?utm_source=openai))

- **Jason Clinton**: Chief Information Security Officer, Jason is responsible for safeguarding Anthropic's information assets and infrastructure. ([theorg.com](https://theorg.com/org/anthropic/teams/leadership-team-1?utm_source=openai))

- **Sasha de Marigny**: Chief Communications Officer, Sasha was promoted to this role in November 2025, leading the company's communications and branding efforts. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2025/11/20/anthropic-sasha-de-marigny-chief-communications-officer?utm_source=openai))

Under the leadership of this experienced team, Anthropic has rapidly grown, attracting top-tier talent and securing significant funding to advance its mis…",
